auth.tagline: Chakula halisi · jiko halisi · watu halisi
auth.sign_in_sub: Agiza kutoka kwa wapishi wa nyumbani karibu nawe.
auth.or_phone: au tumia nambari yako ya simu
auth.customer_desc: Agiza chakula cha nyumbani kutoka kwa wapishi karibu nami
auth.cook_desc: Uza chakula kutoka jikoni mwangu kwa jamii yangu
auth.feature1: Wapishi halisi, jikoni halisi karibu nawe
auth.feature3: Wapishi waliothibitishwa na wenye vyeti vya usalama wa chakula
auth.sms_note: Tutatuma msimbo wa nambari 6 kwa nambari hii. Gharama za kawaida za SMS zinaweza kutumika.
auth.otp_note: Hukupokea? Hakikisha nambari yako ni sahihi kisha jaribu kutuma tena.
auth.otp_error: Msimbo huo si sahihi. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
auth.role_subtitle: Unaweza kubadilisha wakati wowote kutoka kwenye wasifu wako.

onboarding.area_later: Weka eneo lako baadaye ili kugundua wapishi wa nyumbani ndani ya kilomita 10.
onboarding.fresh_food: Chakula cha nyumbani, kilichopikwa leo — si cha jana kilichopashwa moto.
onboarding.no_cooks: Hakuna wapishi bado — rudi baadaye wakiongezeka karibu nawe.
onboarding.discover: Gundua wapishi wa nyumbani, agiza milo mipya, na saidia waundaji katika jamii yako.
onboarding.nearby: Wapishi ndani ya kilomita 10 kutoka kwako
onboarding.real_people: Watu halisi, chakula halisi, hadithi halisi

home.check_back: Rudi hivi karibuni au chunguza sehemu nyingine.
home.rate_prompt: Tathmini yako inasaidia watu wengi zaidi kugundua wapishi wazuri wa nyumbani karibu nao.
home.follow_next: Fuata kwa ajili ya mara ijayo
home.notif_rationale: Pata arifa wapishi unaowapenda wanapoanza moja kwa moja, kutoa sahani mpya, au kufanya mauzo ya ghafla.
home.your_cravings_sub: Sahani ulizoziweka alama — gusa kuona, kuagiza tena, au kuondoa.
home.manage_subscriptions_sub: Mipango ya milo ya kudumu, milo ya zawadi, na wanufaika mahali pamoja.

discover.title: Gundua
discover.hint_sub: Jaribu "jollof", "Lagos", au gusa kichujio hapo juu
discover.certified: Ana cheti cha usalama wa chakula

notifications.title: Arifa
notifications.empty_sub: Tutakujulisha kitu kikitokea kwenye maagizo yako.

orders.title: Maagizo yako
orders.refund: Marejesho yameanzishwa — subiri siku 3–5 za kazi.
orders.cancelled_note: Agizo hili lilighairiwa. Wasiliana na help@foodsbyme.com kwa maswali.
orders.dispute_closes: Muda wa malalamiko unafunga baada ya
orders.past_hint: Historia ya maagizo yako itaonekana hapa.
orders.tip_sub: Bakshishi inakwenda moja kwa moja kwa

tracking.title: Fuatilia agizo lako
tracking.code_hint: Msomee rider msimbo huu atakapofika ili kuthibitisha uwasilishaji.
tracking.cash_arrival: kwa fedha taslimu kwa rider wako atakapofika.
tracking.transfer_arrival: kwenye nambari ya rider wako atakapofika.

checkout.title: Agizo lako
checkout.protected_text: Malipo yako yanahifadhiwa kwa usalama. Kama kuna tatizo na agizo lako, tumekulinda.
checkout.cash_desc: Lipa kwa fedha taslimu chakula kikifika
checkout.transfer_desc: Tuma kwa nambari ya rider atakapofika
checkout.tip_note: Bakshishi zote 100% zinakwenda kwa mpishi wako.
checkout.note_placeholder: Kuna maombi maalum au mizio ya kutaja?
checkout.cash_rider: Chakula kimehifadhiwa · lipa rider kwa fedha taslimu au uhamishaji atakapofika
checkout.allergen_text: Agizo lako lina viungo vinavyolingana na wasifu wako wa mzio:
checkout.pay_catering_deposit: Lipa Amana ya Huduma za Chakula
checkout.catering_deposit_note: Amana ya huduma za chakula — salio linalobaki linalipwa siku hiyo
checkout.booking_deposit_note: Amana ya uhifadhi — salio linalobaki linalipwa baada ya kukamilika
checkout.deposit_info: Amana hii inahakikisha uhifadhi wako. Ada ya jukwaa ya 5% inatumika kwa miamala yote ya huduma kwenye FOODS.

account.title: Akaunti yako
account.sign_in: Ingia ili kusimamia wasifu wako, kufuatilia maagizo, na kufikia pochi yako.
account.allergen_note: Wapishi wanaonyeshwa onyo wakati sahani yao inalingana na mizio yako.
account.health_note: Waundaji wa Jikoni la Afya wanaweza kubuni mipango ya milo kulingana na hali zako ukijisajili.
account.register_cook_sub: Anza kuuza milo ya nyumbani kwa jamii yako
account.back_kitchen_sub: Simamia menyu yako, maagizo na mapato
account.delete_confirm: Hii itafuta kabisa akaunti yako na data zote zinazohusiana. Haiwezi kutenduliwa.
account.username_hint: Herufi 3–20. Herufi, namba na alama ya kistari chini tu.
account.health_conditions_hint: Chagua hali zinazokuhusu. Waundaji wa Jikoni la Afya wanaweza kutumia hii kubuni mipango ya milo.

cook_home.add_hint: Ongeza mlo ili kuanza kupokea maagizo leo.
cook_home.kitchen_live: Jikoni Liko Hewani — Gusa Kuondoka Mtandaoni
cook_home.first_review: Tathmini yako ya kwanza itaonekana hapa mteja akikadiria agizo lake.
cook_home.milestone_msg: Hatua kubwa. Wateja wako wanakupenda. Endelea hivyo.

cook_orders.title: Maagizo
cook_orders.otp_title: Hitaji misimbo ya OTP ya kuchukua na kuwasilisha
cook_orders.otp_sub: Rider wanachanganua OTP kuchukua na kuwasilisha maagizo
cook_orders.inbox_title: Ona maombi yote kwenye Sanduku la Ujumbe
cook_orders.inbox_hint: Uhifadhi wa mpishi binafsi, maombi maalum na maagizo mengi yanasimamiwa kwenye kichupo cha Sanduku la Ujumbe.
cook_orders.live_hint: Uko hewani — maagizo kutoka kwa wateja yataonekana hapa.
cook_orders.offline_hint: Ingia hewani ili kuanza kupokea maagizo kutoka kwa wateja walio karibu.

cook_earnings.title: Mapato
cook_earnings.account_hint: Kama inavyoonekana kwenye taarifa ya benki yako
cook_earnings.bank_security: Maelezo yako ya benki yamesimbwa na yanatumika tu kwa malipo.
cook_earnings.bank_saved: Akaunti ya benki imehifadhiwa. Sasa unaweza kuomba malipo.
cook_earnings.payout_done: Malipo yako yameombwa. Yatawasili ndani ya siku 1 ya kazi.

cook_menu.title: Menyu yangu
cook_menu.empty_hint: Menyu yako haina kitu. Ongeza sahani yako ya kwanza na wateja wataweza kuagiza kwako leo.
cook_menu.limited: Ofa ya muda mfupi — njoo uichukue!

certifications.title: Vyeti
certifications.intro: Pakia hati zako za usalama wa chakula na biashara. Timu yetu inapitia kila uwasilishaji ndani ya siku 3-5 za kazi. Vyeti vilivyoidhinishwa vitaonekana kama beji kwenye duka lako.
certifications.food_safety_desc: NAFDAC, HACCP, au cheti cha usalama wa chakula cha eneo
certifications.health_desc: Cheti kutoka kwa mamlaka ya afya iliyoidhinishwa
certifications.cac_desc: Usajili wa biashara wa Tume ya Masuala ya Kampuni
certifications.culinary_desc: Cheti cha shule ya upishi ya kitaalamu au mpishi
certifications.nafdac_desc: Usajili wa bidhaa wa NAFDAC au idhini ya kituo
certifications.permit_desc: Kibali chochote cha jikoni au ushughulikiaji wa chakula kilichotolewa na serikali
certifications.submitted_ok: Hati yako iko chini ya ukaguzi. Tutakuarifu ndani ya siku 3-5 za kazi.

dish_form.required_ingredient: Ongeza angalau kiungo kimoja kabla ya kuchapisha
dish_form.required_photo: Ongeza angalau picha moja kabla ya kuchapisha
dish_form.photos_hint: Onyesha sahani yako kwa pembe tofauti
dish_form.dish_name_placeholder: mfano: Wali wa Jollof na ndizi
dish_form.cook_note_placeholder: Ujumbe wa kibinafsi kwa wateja wako
dish_form.delivery_window_hint: Muda wa uwasilishaji — muda ambao wateja wanaweza kuchukua au kupokea sahani hii kwenye tarehe iliyo juu.
dish_form.ingredients_hint: Wateja wanaona hii. Vizio vinabainishwa kiotomatiki.
dish_form.dietary_labels_hint: Wasaidie wateja wenye mahitaji maalum ya mlo kupata sahani hii
dish_form.discount_hint: Inaonyeshwa kwa wateja kwenye wasifu wako
dish_form.percentage_off_loyalty_label: Asilimia ya punguzo (kwa wateja wa mara kwa mara)
dish_form.visible_to_customers_hint: Zima ili kuficha sahani hii bila kuifuta

search.find_sub: Tafuta waundaji, sahani, kozi, bidhaa, huduma, menyu za kila wiki, hadithi na machapisho
search.no_results_body: Jaribu utafutaji tofauti, au chunguza kinachopendwa sasa hivi.

dispute.title: Wasilisha Malalamiko
dispute.protection_text: Malipo yako yamelindwa wakati tunachunguza. Tutatatua hili ndani ya saa 48.
dispute.fraud_desc: Malipo ya kutiliwa shaka au yasiyoidhinishwa
dispute.placeholder: mfano: Niliagiza Wali wa Jollof na Kuku lakini nilipokea Wali wa Kukaanga bila protini yoyote. Chakula pia kilikuwa baridi kilipofika...
dispute.hint: Kuwa mahususi — taja ulichoagiza dhidi ya ulichopokea.
dispute.resolution: Utatuzi ndani ya saa 48. Pande zote mbili zitaarifiwa na kuombwa kutoa ushahidi.
dispute.filed_success: Malalamiko yamewasilishwa. Tutayapitia ndani ya saa 48.
dispute.no_evidence: Hakuna ushahidi uliopakiwa bado. Pakia picha au hati kuunga mkono kesi yako.
dispute.permission_required_body: Ruhusu ufikiaji wa maktaba ya picha ili kuambatanisha ushahidi.

bookings.title: Uhifadhi wa matukio
bookings.hire: Ajiri mpishi kwa ajili ya tukio lako
bookings.hire_sub: Siku ya kuzaliwa, harusi, chakula cha jioni cha kampuni, mkusanyiko wa karibu — vinjari wapishi wanaohudumia matukio binafsi na tuma ombi moja kwa moja.
bookings.find_desc: Vinjari wasifu + gusa "Ajiri kwa ajili ya tukio"
bookings.quote_desc: Mpishi anapitia maelezo yako na kutuma bei
bookings.no_bookings_body: Maombi yako ya matukio yataonekana hapa ukisha tuma.

cook_enquiries.title: Maombi

cook_enquiries.share_hint: Shiriki wasifu wako ili wateja waweze kukutumia maombi.
cook_enquiries.quote_sent_body: Mteja ameariwa kuhusu nukuu yako ya bei.

cook_settings.title: Mipangilio ya Huduma za Mpishi

cook_settings.accommodation_hint: Kwa matukio ya siku nyingi au ya mbali
cook_settings.flat_fee_ph: Acha wazi kama hakuna ada isiyobadilika
cook_settings.partial_save_body: Sehemu {{count}} hazikuweza kuhifadhiwa. Tafadhali jaribu tena.
cook_settings.guest_tiers_hint: Weka kiwango kwa kila mtu au kiwango kisichobadilika kwa kila kigawanyo cha wageni.

cook_profile.story_shared_body: Hadithi yako sasa iko hewani kwa saa 24.

analytics.title: Maarifa ya Muundaji
analytics.no_data_body: Takwimu zinaongezeka unapopokea maagizo na kushirikiana na wateja.
analytics.insight_start: Anza kupokea maagizo ili kufungua maarifa yako binafsi.
analytics.no_revenue_body: Takwimu za mapato zitaonekana baada ya agizo lako la kwanza.
analytics.insight_craving: Wafuasi wako wana hamu ya {{dish}} — watu {{count}} wanaitaka.
analytics.insight_revenue_up: Mapato yamepanda {{delta}} kipindi hiki. Kasi nzuri!
analytics.insight_content_reach: Maudhui yako yamefikia watu {{count}} kipindi hiki.
analytics.insight_engagements: Maudhui yako yamesababisha mihusiano {{count}} kipindi hiki.
analytics.loyalty_rate_body: {{pct}}% ya wateja wako wameagiza zaidi ya mara moja.
analytics.no_audience_data_body: Maarifa ya hadhira yataonekana ukiwa na wafuasi na maagizo.
analytics.no_content_data_body: Chapisha maudhui ili kuona maarifa ya utendaji hapa.
analytics.no_cravings_body: Data ya hamu itaonekana wateja wanapoanza kutamani sahani zako.
analytics.no_customers_here_body: Hakuna wateja wanaolingana na kichujio hiki bado.
analytics.no_follower_data_body: Ukuaji wa wafuasi utaonekana hapa hadhira yako inapokua.

cook_health.published_body: Waliojisajili sasa wanaweza kuona mpango huu.
cook_health.unpublished_body: Mpango huu sasa umefichwa kwa waliojisajili.

cook_referrals.share_message: Jiunge nami kwenye FOODS — jukwaa la wapishi wa nyumbani na waundaji wa chakula. Tumia kiungo changu kujisajili: {{url}}

cook_referrals.hero_sub: Shiriki kiungo chako. Mpishi anapojisajili na kuweka agizo lake la kwanza, nyote wawili mnapata.
cook_referrals.load_error_body: Imeshindwa kupakia data ya rufaa. Vuta ili kuonyesha upya.

cook_reviews.reported_body: Timu yetu itapitia hili hivi karibuni.

feed.title: Hadithi za Chakula

following.unfollow_confirm_body: Utaacha kupokea masasisho kutoka kwa mpishi huyu.

following.empty_body: Fuata wapishi ili kuarifiwa wanapoingia hewani, kutoa sahani mpya, au kufanya mauzo ya ghafla.

gifting.title: Kutoa Zawadi
gifting.subtitle: Toa zawadi ya chakula halisi cha nyumbani
gifting.card_note: Kadi za zawadi haziishi muda na zinaweza kukombolewa kwenye agizo lolote.
gifting.plan_being_set_up: Mpango wa milo wa {{plan}} wa {{who}} unaandaliwa.
gifting.foods_assigns_cooks: FOODS itapanga na kubadilisha wapishi bora wanaopatikana.
gifting.nutritionist_reach_out: Mtaalamu wa lishe atawasiliana ndani ya saa 24 kupanga menyu.
gifting.view_schedules_hint: Ona ratiba za milo, idhinisha au kataa milo kwenye kichupo cha Mipango Yangu.
gifting.foods_matching_desc: Tunalinganisha na kubadilisha wapishi bora wa nyumbani kulingana na upatikanaji, mahali, na mahitaji ya mlo — ili milo iwe mipya na ya kuaminika kila wakati.
gifting.select_meal_hint: Chagua angalau mlo mmoja ili kuendelea.
gifting.dietician_desc: Mtaalamu wa lishe aliyeidhinishwa anabuni kila mlo kwa malengo maalum ya kiafya na vizuizi.
gifting.meal_preferences: Mapendeleo ya mlo na maelezo ya lishe
gifting.preferences_placeholder: mfano: bila nyama ya nguruwe, anapendelea vyakula vya Kiyoruba, inafaa kwa kisukari, sodiamu kidogo, mzio wa njugu…
gifting.preferences_note: Maelezo haya yanakwenda kwa mpishi aliyepangwa na mtaalamu wa lishe (kama ameongezwa). Kadiri unavyotoa maelezo zaidi, ndivyo milo inavyokuwa bora.
gifting.nutritionist_review_notes: Mtaalamu wa lishe atapitia maelezo haya na kuwasiliana ndani ya saa 24.
gifting.assign_rotate_desc: FOODS itapanga na kubadilisha wapishi bora wanaopatikana. Utaona kila wakati nani anayepika kila mlo.
gifting.view_approve_hint: Unaweza kuona kila mlo {{who}} anaolishwa na kuidhinisha au kukataa milo kutoka kichupo cha Mipango Yangu.
gifting.no_active_plans_sub: Usajili unaotoa zawadi utaonekana hapa na ratiba kamili za milo.
gifting.no_meals_scheduled_sub: Mpishi wako atapakia ratiba ya milo kabla ya uwasilishaji kuanza. Utaarifiwa itakapokuwa tayari.
gifting.reject_meal_hint: Mwambie mpishi kwa nini — atapendekeza mbadala.
gifting.reject_reason_placeholder: mfano: mpokeaji ana mzio wa dagaa, anapendelea vyakula vya mimea…
gifting.type_daily_desc: Milo ya kawaida iliyopikwa nyumbani inayoletwa kwa ratiba
gifting.type_senior_desc: Milo yenye lishe iliyoandaliwa kwa ajili ya wazee
gifting.type_wellness_desc: Milo inayolenga afya kwa malengo ya usawa wa mwili na ustawi
gifting.type_office_desc: Milo yanayojirudia yanayoletwa mahali pa kazi
gifting.type_birthday_desc: Mpango mfupi wa milo kusherehekea tukio maalum
gifting.type_family_desc: Milo yenye kiasi na ratiba kwa ajili ya kaya nzima

user_profile.eye_icon_hint: Tap the eye icon on any craving to make it public or private
user_profile.share_cravings_list_sub: Let friends know what you want — they can gift you or order for themselves

register_fleet.photo_access_denied: Allow photo access in Settings to upload documents.
register_fleet.submitted_body: We'll notify you once it's approved.
register_fleet.account_name_placeholder: As it appears on your account
register_fleet.bank_note: Weekly payouts will be sent to this account.

subscription.title: Membership Tiers
subscription.no_tiers_body: Create tiers to offer exclusive benefits to your subscribers.
subscription.invalid_price_body: Enter a valid price to continue.
subscription.name_required_body: Give this tier a name before saving.
subscription.tier_created: Your new subscription tier is live.
subscription.tier_updated: Your subscription tier has been updated.

cook_onboarding.desc_baker: Bake and sell bread, pastries and cakes
cook_onboarding.desc_dietician: Give nutrition guidance and meal advice
cook_onboarding.desc_home_cook: Cook and sell meals from my home kitchen
cook_onboarding.desc_nutritionist: Create meal plans for specific health goals
cook_onboarding.setup_profile_sub: This is how customers will find and know you
cook_onboarding.link_social_body: Your FOODS username must exactly match your Instagram, TikTok, or X handle. This ensures only the real owner can claim a handle.
cook_onboarding.username_hint: Must match one of your handles above — lowercase, numbers, underscores
cook_onboarding.must_match_handle: Must exactly match one of your handles above
cook_onboarding.bio_hint: Tell customers about your cooking style
cook_onboarding.bio_placeholder: I cook authentic Nigerian dishes with ingredients from local markets…
cook_onboarding.bank_hint: Select your bank for Flutterwave payouts
cook_onboarding.payment_details_sub: How would you like to receive your earnings? You can update this later.
cook_onboarding.instagram_business_note: Requires a Business or Creator account. Switch to Professional in Instagram settings → Account type.
cook_onboarding.add_code_to_bio: Add this anywhere in your {{platform}} bio, then tap Verify.

health_specs.title: Health Kitchen
health_specs.info_banner: Health Kitchen unlocks your profile in health-filtered discovery, lets you sell meal plans, and gives you access to subscriber feeding histories (with their consent).
health_specs.registration_hint: Enter your CFRDN registration number. We'll verify it before showing your credential badge.
health_specs.specialisations_hint: Select every condition or dietary style you can support.
health_specs.no_specs_warning: No specialisations selected will disable your Health Kitchen status.

meal_archive.title: Meal Archive
meal_archive.no_dishes_hint: Create your first dish to start taking orders.

library.download_error_body: Could not download file. Try again.
library.title: My Library
library.empty_sub: Digital products you buy — recipe books, meal plans, guides — will appear here for easy re-download.

hire_cook.title: Book Private Chef
hire_cook.description_placeholder: Menu preferences, service style, special requests...
hire_cook.no_payment_notice: No payment required yet. The chef will send you a personalised quote within 24 hours.
hire_cook.enquiry_sent: Booking enquiry sent! The chef will respond shortly.

customer_health_plans.subscribed_message: You're now on {{title}}. Your feeding history has been shared with the creator.
customer_health_plans.revoke_access_message: Stop {{name}} from seeing your feeding history?
customer_health_plans.consent_notice: Subscribing grants {{name}} read access to your 90-day feeding history so they can tailor guidance. You can revoke this at any time.
customer_health_plans.no_plans_body: Health Kitchen creators will publish meal plans here.
customer_health_plans.no_active_plans_body: Browse and subscribe to a meal plan to get started.
customer_health_plans.feeding_history_body: When you subscribe to a plan, the creator gets read access to your last 90 days of orders to help tailor their guidance. You can revoke this at any time below.
customer_health_plans.no_active_consents_body: No health creators currently have access to your feeding history.

content_insights.no_content_body: Create posts to see how they perform with your audience.

cook_content.delete_post_message: This will permanently remove the post.
cook_content.publish_error: Could not publish post. Please try again.
cook_content.title: My Content
cook_content.empty_published_hint: Share a dish reveal, kitchen story, or flash sale to reach your followers.
cook_content.empty_scheduled_hint: Schedule posts in advance to keep your audience engaged.
cook_content.empty_drafts_hint: Save drafts while you perfect your content.

cook_commerce.title: Creator Commerce
cook_commerce.no_invoices_hint: Create your first invoice to start getting paid.
cook_commerce.no_products_hint: Create recipe books, meal plans and more to sell to your audience.
cook_commerce.no_tiers_hint: Create tiers to offer exclusive content, early access, and perks to your biggest fans.
cook_commerce.no_subscribers_hint: Subscribers will appear here once they follow your health kitchen.

register_rider.submitted_body: Your rider profile is under review. We'll notify you within 1–2 business days. Once approved, download the FOODS Rider app to start earning.
register_rider.identity_check_failed: Identity check failed. You can retry from the Rider app once approved.
register_rider.title: Register as Rider
register_rider.documents_hint: Uploading these now speeds up your approval. You can also submit them later.
register_rider.verify_identity_hint: Helps us keep the platform safe. Your number is sent to Flutterwave for verification — we only store the last 4 digits.
register_rider.bvn_hint: Dial *565*0# on your registered line to retrieve your BVN.
register_rider.nin_hint: Find your NIN on your NIMC slip or dial *346# on MTN.
register_rider.bank_details_hint: Weekly payouts will be sent to this account.
register_rider.account_name_placeholder: As it appears on your account

cook_public.scan_hint: Scan to visit my kitchen on FOODSbyme
cook_public.today_empty_body: Check back tomorrow or browse the archive.
cook_public.service_private_chef_desc: Book this chef for your home event. Exclusive, personal service.
cook_public.service_catering_desc: Catering for up to {{count}} guests. Weddings, corporate events, parties.
cook_public.services_empty_body: This creator currently only offers regular food orders.
cook_public.store_empty_body: Recipe books, meal plans and more coming soon.

creator_branding.share_message: Check out my profile on FOODSbyme: {{url}}
creator_branding.creator_types_sub: Select all that apply. These shape your storefront tabs and discovery filters.
creator_branding.bio_placeholder: Tell customers about your cooking style, specialties, and story…
creator_branding.brand_logo_sub: Square logo shown on your storefront alongside FOODS branding
creator_branding.brand_colours_sub: Select a preset or enter your own hex codes
creator_branding.share_profile_sub: Send your storefront link to existing customers and followers
creator_branding.qr_footer_text: Scan to visit my kitchen on FOODSbyme
creator_branding.qr_code_sub: Set a custom URL above to generate your QR code
creator_branding.cover_image_sub: Shown at the top of your storefront and shared links. Recommended: 1200×630
creator_branding.branding_always_visible: FOODSbyme branding always remains visible. Full white-labeling is not allowed.
creator_branding.font_hint: Must be a Google Font name. Leave blank to use the theme default.
creator_branding.profile_url_sub: Claim a custom URL that links directly to your storefront. Once set, it becomes your permanent public identity on FOODS.
creator_branding.slug_hint: 3–50 characters: lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only
creator_branding.slug_taken: This URL is already taken. Try another.
creator_branding.set_url_first_hint: Set a custom URL first to get a cleaner shareable link.
